sql: SELECT l.name AS league_name FROM "Match" AS m JOIN league AS l ON l.id = m.league_id WHERE m.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY l.id, l.name HAVING SUM(m.home_team_goal)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) > SUM(m.away_team_goal)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) ORDER BY l.name;
